DAVID HART FOR APR-01-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. SANCTIONS MAY BE PAID VIA E-FILING. IF SANCTIONS PAID BEFORE 04/01/22 THEN THE COURT WILL VACATE THE OSC DATE. IF NOT, COUNSEL MAY FILE A DECLARATION AND APPEAR ON APR-01-2022. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO JUL-18-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. ALL DISCOVERY CLOSED. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
